text: According to our records, you’re on an Installment Payment Plan and have $session.params.api.billingProfile.ippDetails.remainingInstallments payments remaining. Your next installment amount is $session.params.api.billingProfile.ippDetails.ippCurrentBalance.

Selon nos dossiers, vous avez un plan de versements et il vous reste $session.params.api.billingProfile.ippDetails.remainingInstallments versements. Le montant de votre prochain versement est de $session.params.api.billingProfile.ippDetails.ippCurrentBalance.
